\node[legend] at (0.0,-14.25) {Gravity: Seeds reaching gravity-channel transposition.};
\node[legend] at (0.0,-14.50) {Vertical: Seeds retaining final comb tilt at least 0.80.};
\node[legend] at (0.0,-14.75) {Collapse: Seeds whose success fell to 0.02 or below.};
\node[legend] at (0.0,-15.00) {Recovered: Collapsed seeds ending with success at least 0.10.};
\node[legend] at (0.0,-15.25) {Final success: Final-generation mean foraging success.};
\node[legend] at (0.0,-15.50) {Final tilt: Final-generation mean comb tilt.};
\end{tikzpicture}
\caption{Long axial-orientation transition experiment. Rows are initial comb tilt, columns are proportional vertical-comb advantage $\alpha$, and modifier headings give $f(t)$. Count panels report seeds out of ten; continuous panels report final-generation means. The generated fragment records the source CSV.}
\label{fig:long-transition-heatmap}
\end{figure}
